checker_type.description: Specifies the type of checker to use for the uptime check, such as STATIC_IP or VPC. Must match the supported checker types for the resource.

content_matchers.description: Specifies the criteria for evaluating the response content of the uptime check, including exact or partial matches.
content_matchers.type: list(object({content: string,matcher: optional(string),json_path_matcher: list(object({json_matcher: optional(string),json_path: string}))}))

display_name.description: The user-friendly name for the uptime check, displayed in the Google Cloud Console and used for identification purposes.

http_check.description: Specifies the HTTP settings for the uptime check, including URL, request method, headers, and validation rules.
http_check.type: list(object({body: optional(string),content_type: optional(string),custom_content_type: optional(string),headers: optional(map(string)),mask_headers: optional(bool),path: optional(string),port: optional(number),request_method: optional(string),use_ssl: optional(bool),validate_ssl: optional(bool),accepted_response_status_codes: list(object({status_class: optional(string),status_value: optional(number)})),auth_info: list(object({password: optional(string),password_wo: optional(string),password_wo_version: optional(string),username: string})),ping_config: list(object({pings_count: number})),service_agent_authentication: list(object({type: optional(string)}))}))

log_check_failures.description: Enables logging for failed uptime checks to assist with troubleshooting and monitoring.

monitored_resource.description: Specifies the monitored resource to check, such as a GCE instance or App Engine service; must match the resource type and labels required by the uptime check.

period.description: Defines the frequency at which uptime checks are performed, specified in seconds. Must be a multiple of 60.

resource_group.description: Defines the group of monitored resources for the uptime check, such as instances or services, based on specified criteria.

selected_regions.description: Defines the geographic regions from which the uptime checks will be performed; must be a list of valid region codes.

synthetic_monitor.description: Defines the synthetic monitoring configuration for an uptime check, specifying settings for simulated user requests to test service availability.

tcp_check.description: Defines the TCP-based configuration for the uptime check, specifying connection details such as port and optional headers.

timeout.description: Duration to wait for a response before marking the uptime check as failed; must be between 1 and 60 seconds.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeout durations for create, update, and delete operations, ensuring operations complete within specified limits.

user_labels.description: Custom labels to organize and identify the uptime check; must be key-value pairs.
